安全中心集中展示安全策略配置: The security center provides a centralized view of security policy configurations, including password policies, IP whitelisting, and multi-factor authentication.
安全策略变更将影响所有管理员: Security policy changes will affect all administrators.
密码长度至少6位: Password must be at least 6 characters
两次输入的密码不一致: The two passwords do not match
启用IP白名单前请先添加至少一个IP地址: Please add at least one IP address before enabling the whitelist
强制所有用户启用MFA: Require all users to enable MFA
进入安全中心查看安全策略概览: Enter the security center to view the security policy overview
在修改密码区域输入当前密码和新密码: Enter current and new password in the change password section
查看密码策略了解复杂度要求: View the password policy to understand complexity requirements
管理IP白名单控制访问来源: Manage IP whitelist to control access sources
配置多因素认证增强账户安全: Configure multi-factor authentication to enhance account security
密码策略控制密码复杂度和过期时间: Password policy controls password complexity and expiration time
修改密码后需使用新密码重新登录: After changing password, re-login with new password is required
IP白名单启用后仅允许白名单IP访问: When IP whitelist is enabled, only whitelisted IPs are allowed access
MFA多因素认证提供额外安全保护: MFA multi-factor authentication provides additional security protection
当前密码输入错误将导致修改失败: Incorrect current password will cause the change to fail
新密码必须符合密码策略要求: New password must meet password policy requirements
启用IP白名单前请确保添加管理员IP: Before enabling IP whitelist, ensure the administrator IP is added
